apparatus_reference: Hasse et al., Phys. Rev. A 109, 053105 (2024) — AC-beam subsystem at the Freiburg 25Mg+ trap.

omega_over_2pi.notes: Approximate; set by B ~ 0.58 mT. Not used in the dimensionless simulation; recorded for provenance.

LF_axial.description: Axial low-frequency mode used for stroboscopic measurement in Hasse 2024.

omega_m_over_2pi.source: calibration: carrier+sideband spectroscopy (cf. Hasse Table II, 1.3 MHz)
omega_m_over_2pi.notes: Hasse 2024 quotes 1.3 MHz; 1.306 MHz is the strobo 2.0 task-assigned working value.

lamb_dicke_eta.source: calibration: red-blue sideband ratio (Hasse Table II LF eta = 0.40)
lamb_dicke_eta.notes: 0.395 is the strobo 2.0 task-assigned working value; consistent with Hasse's 0.40.

thermal_occupation.source: design: treat as ground state (Hasse quotes < 0.2; strobo 2.0 uses pure-state baseline)
thermal_occupation.notes: Set to effectively zero for the v0.3 pure-unitary sweep. Promote to ~0.15 if thermal admixture becomes relevant (see sweep-complete sec. 7, next-step 4).

MF_radial.description: Radial mid-frequency mode (~ 2.9 MHz), documented for completeness — not used in strobo 2.0.

HF_radial.description: Radial high-frequency mode; not used in strobo 2.0.

MW.description: Global microwave drive on the qubit carrier (lambda_eff ~ 10 cm, eta = 0 all modes).

CC.description: Collinear TPSR configuration (motion-insensitive, eta ~ 0 all modes).

AC.description: Anti-parallel TPSR polarization-gradient traveling wave. Motion-sensitive (nonzero eta per mode).

rabi_over_2pi.notes: Baseline apparatus value. Strobo 2.0 v0.3 uses sequence-specific overrides (pi/2 calibration) rather than this value.

T1_short_pi2.description: Short pi/2 train T1: 3 x 100 ns at 0.77 us spacing, AC beam on LF axial mode.

inter_pulse_spacing.source: design: strobo 2.0 task specification (+0.56 % super-T_m slip by construction)

rabi_override.source: derived: N * Omega * exp(-eta^2/2) * dt = pi/2 (Hasse App. D convention)
rabi_override.notes: ~3x the AC baseline Omega; lab feasibility flagged in logbook/2026-04-21-rabi-reconciliation.md sec. 4.

analysis_phase_deg.source: design: canonical phi = 0 for the sweep; phi-scan recovered via two-run extraction

T2_short_pi2.description: Short pi/2 train T2: 7 x 50 ns at 0.77 us spacing, AC beam on LF axial mode.

rabi_override.source: derived: N * Omega * exp(-eta^2/2) * dt = pi/2

spin_T2_us.notes: Not applied in the v0.3 pure-unitary sweep. Used for future noisy-dynamics companion runs.

motional_heating_quanta_per_ms.source: design: pure-state baseline; lab heating rate not yet characterised for this config.

residual_AC_phase_drift_rad_per_2s.source: literature: Hasse 2024 Table I (AC AC, 2-s Allan deviation)
residual_AC_phase_drift_rad_per_2s.notes: Phase jitter on the train. Ignored in v0.3 pure-unitary sweep.

initial_state.spin_preparation: |+x> via MW pi/2 from |down> (absorbed into simulation state prep).
initial_state.motional_preparation: Coherent state D(alpha)|0> with |alpha| in {1, 3, 4.5} and phase theta_0 swept.

displacement_amplitudes.source: calibration: precalibrated voltage sets at six control electrodes, cf. Hasse 2024 sec. II

notes.stroboscopic_slip: Delta_t / T_m = 0.770 us / 0.7657 us = 1.0056 (+0.56 % super-stroboscopic). Deliberate, see logbook/2026-04-21-kickoff.md sec. 2.
notes.rabi_history: See logbook/2026-04-21-rabi-reconciliation.md v0.2 for the three-candidate history (0.178, 0.300, 0.446 MHz) that was replaced by the per-sequence pi/2 rabi_override.
notes.numerical_regime: Omega_eff / omega_m ~ 0.55-0.64 per train -> strong-drive regime; intra-pulse Magnus correction reduces peak |C| from sin(pi/2) = 1 to ~0.92.
notes.what_is_NOT_here: Laser-intensity noise, beam-pointing jitter, magnetic-field drift, imperfect state prep fidelity. Add if/when the pure-unitary baseline needs to be promoted to a noise model.
